# minio_s3_bucket_retention (Data Source)

Reads the object lock retention configuration of an existing S3 bucket.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_s3_bucket_retention" "example" {
  bucket = "my-bucket"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `mode` (String)
- `unit` (String)
- `validity_period` (Number)
